Part.Source:
Event Start
tbLoad.Visible = 0 dados.Visible = 0 RCOOpen.Visible = 0 TableFilters.Visible = 1 &CreCliCod = &ParmCreCliCod txtCliCodEna.Caption = trim(str(&CreCliCod)) tbAttClICod.Visible = 1 tbtxtCliCod.Visible = 0 LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &Hoje = SErverDate() &IsVinculos = True
retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWHISTORICOCLIENTE', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) &AutNivTel = 4 if &Context.PesIsVen = true retornaAutorizacao.Call('TELEVENDATROCARVENDEDOR', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1, &AutNivTel) EndIF
&SdtHistCliente.Clear()
padraoUsuario.Call('L', &PgmName, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod)
if &ParmCreCliCod.IsEmpty() &CreCliCod = val(Substr(&PadObs,1, 8)) txtCliCodEna.Caption = trim(str(&CreCliCod)) EndIf
&Aux = Substr(&PadObs, 9, 1) &IsVinculos = iif(&Aux in ('S', ''), true, false)
&Aux = Substr(&PadObs, 10, 1) &IsAbertos = iif(&Aux in ('S', ''), true, false)
&Ordem = Substr(&PadObs, 11, 1)
&dias = val(Substr(&PadObs, 12, 4)) if &dias <= 0 //or &dias > 2500 &dias = 1460 EndIf &DtaIni = &Hoje - &dias
&var = trim(substr(&PadObs,16,4)) if not &var.IsEmpty() &Linhas.FromString(&var) Else &Linhas = Page.Rows5 Endif &OldPage = &Linhas
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
UnnamedTable2.Width = 910 tbProt.Width = 105 UnnamedTable8.Width = 105 UnnamedTable7.Width = 105 atzMed.Width = 105 UnnamedTable6.Width = 105 tbtotNegoc1.Width = 105 UnnamedTable5.Width = 105 UnnamedTable4.Width = 105 UnnamedTable3.Width = 105
Do 'AttributesSecurityCode' &OldDtaIni.Visible = False &OldIsAbertos.Visible = False &OldIsVinculos.Visible = False &OldOrdem.Visible = False &OldCreCliCod.Visible = False GridGridSdtHistClientes.Rows = &Linhas GridGridSdtHistClientesPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = GridGridSdtHistClientes.Rows
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
&CreRecPag.Clear() &CreRecPag.AddItem('R', 'Receb.') &CreRecPag.AddItem('P', 'Pagar')
&PesVenCod = &Context.PesCod
&OldDtaIni = &DtaIni
&OldOrdem = &Ordem &OldIsAbertos = &IsAbertos &OldIsVinculos = &IsVinculos
Do 'ValidaClienteDoVendedor' If &IsErro = false
do 'retornaSDT'
tbLoad.Visible = 1 dados.Visible = 0 tbAttClICod.Visible = 0 tbtxtCliCod.Visible = 1 TableFilters.Visible = 0 EndIf
&OldCreCliCod = &CreCliCod
EndEvent
Event Refresh
&EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&GridGridSdtHistClientesCurrentPage = GridGridSdtHistClientes.CurrentPage &GridGridSdtHistClientesPageCount = GridGridSdtHistClientes.PageCount &GridCreCliCod.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
&GridGridSdtHistClientesRecordCount = &SdtHistCliente.Count
EndEvent
Event GridGridSdtHistClientes.Load
&CreRecPag = &SdtHistCliente.CurrentItem.CreRecPag &GridCreCliCod = &SdtHistCliente.CurrentItem.CreCliCod &GridCreCliRaz = &SdtHistCliente.CurrentItem.CreCliRaz &CreCbrCod = &SdtHistCliente.CurrentItem.CreCbrCod &CreCbrCod.Tooltiptext = &SdtHistCliente.CurrentItem.CreCbrNom &CreDupNro = &SdtHistCliente.CurrentItem.CreDupNro &CreVlrDup = &SdtHistCliente.CurrentItem.CreVlrDup &CrePagVlrDsc = &SdtHistCliente.CurrentItem.CrePagVlrDsc &CrePagVlrJur = &SdtHistCliente.CurrentItem.CrePagVlrJur &CrePagVlr = &SdtHistCliente.CurrentItem.CrePagVlr //&CreDtaEms = &SdtHistCliente.CurrentItem.PedDtaFat //DtaFaturado e nao Emissao JDF //&CreDtaVct = &SdtHistCliente.CurrentItem.CreDtaVct &QtdDiasAtrazo = &SdtHistCliente.CurrentItem.QtdDiaAtz &CrePagDta = &SdtHistCliente.CurrentItem.CrePagDta &CreVlrSdo = &SdtHistCliente.CurrentItem.CreVlrSdo &CreVenCod = &SdtHistCliente.CurrentItem.CreVenCod &GridEmpCod = &SdtHistCliente.CurrentItem.EmpCod &CreCod = &SdtHistCliente.CurrentItem.CreCod &FilCod = &SdtHistCliente.CurrentItem.FilCod &CreDtaCrt = &SdtHistCliente.CurrentItem.CreDtaCrt &CreDtaPrt = &SdtHistCliente.CurrentItem.CreDtaPrt &CrePedVlrLiq = &SdtHistCliente.CurrentItem.CrePedVlrLiq &CrePedCod = &SdtHistCliente.CurrentItem.CrePedCod &ParcialTotal = &SdtHistCliente.CurrentItem.ParcialTotal &gridFiLRaz = &SdtHistCliente.CurrentItem.FilRaz If &SdtHistCliente.CurrentItem.Isboleto = True SdtHistCliente__IsSel.Enabled = True SdtHistCliente__IsSel.Tooltiptext = '' Else SdtHistCliente__IsSel.Enabled = False SdtHistCliente__IsSel.Tooltiptext = 'Duplicata necessita do nosso número via Registro, ou local de cobrança tipo impressão igual á "NADA FAZER"!' EndIf
if &GridCreCliCod <> &CreCliCod SdtHistCliente__IsSel.Tooltiptext = '*CLIENTE VINCULADO* ' + &GridCreCliRaz SdtHistCliente__IsSel.BackColor = RGB(0,100,200) // Azul #vinculo Else SdtHistCliente__IsSel.BackColor = RGB(255,255,255) // Verde EndIF
Do Case Case &CreDtaPrt.IsEmpty() and not &CreDtaCrt.IsEmpty()
&GridCreCliCod.Tooltiptext = '*CLIENTE NO CARTÓRIO* ' + trim(toFormattedString(&CreDtaPrt)) + ' ' + trim(&GridCreCliRaz) &GridCreCliCod.BackColor = RGB(255,177,15) //Laranja
Case Not &CreDtaPrt.IsEmpty()
&GridCreCliCod.Tooltiptext = '*CLIENTE PROTESTADO* ' + trim(toFormattedString(&CreDtaPrt)) + ' ' + trim(&GridCreCliRaz) &GridCreCliCod.BackColor = RGB(230,40,50) //Vermelho
OtherWise &GridCreCliCod.Tooltiptext = &GridCreCliRaz &GridCreCliCod.BackColor = RGB(255,255,255) EndCase
&QtdDiasAtrazo.Tooltiptext = 'Qtd dias de atraso'
If &QtdDiasAtrazo > 0 &QtdDiasAtrazo.ForeColor = RGB(255,0,0) SdtHistCliente__CreDtaVct.ForeColor = RGB(255,0,0) &CrePagDta.ForeColor = RGB(255,0,0) Else &QtdDiasAtrazo.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0) SdtHistCliente__CreDtaVct.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0) &CrePagDta.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0) EndIf
if &ParcialTotal = 'P' &CrePagVlr.Tooltiptext = 'Pagamento Parcial' &CrePagVlr.ForeColor = RGB(240,120,0) Else &CrePagVlr.Tooltiptext = '' &CrePagVlr.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0) EndIF
&CreRecPag.ForeColor = iif(&CreRecPag = ReceberPagar.Receber,RGB(0,0,255),RGB(255,0,0))
&CreDupNro.Link = VerDuplicata.Link('AbreHistoricoCliente', &GridEmpCod,&FilCod,&CreCod) &CreDupNro.LinkTarget = '_blank'
// Event &CrePedCod.Click // &Varchar = ServerTime() &CrePedCod.Link = '' &CrePedCod.Linktarget = '_blank' If &CrePedCod <> 0 If &CreRecPag = ReceberPagar.Receber &NomeArquivo = 'PedidoVenda' + trim(str(&PedCod)) &CrePedCod.Link = RELJAS002.Link(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, &CrePedCod, &Context.PesCod, &NomeArquivo, 'S', &Varchar, true, false) // RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) Else &NomeArquivo = 'PedidoCompra' + trim(str(&PedCod)) &CrePedCod.Link = RELJAS003.Link(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, &CrePedCod, &Context.PesCod, &NomeArquivo, 'S', &Varchar, true,false) // RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) EndIf EndIF
// EndEvent
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
//this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid
Do Case Case &CreDtaPrt.IsEmpty() and not &CreDtaCrt.IsEmpty() &GridCreCliCod.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnWarning WWColumnWarningSingleCell' Case Not &CreDtaPrt.IsEmpty() &GridCreCliCod.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnDanger WWColumnDangerSingleCell' Otherwise &GridCreCliCod.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' EndCase
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event GridGridSdtHistClientesPaginationBar.ChangePage
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Do Case Case GridGridSdtHistClientesPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' GridGridSdtHistClientes.PreviousPage() Case GridGridSdtHistClientesPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' &PageToGo = GridGridSdtHistClientes.CurrentPage &PageToGo += 1 GridGridSdtHistClientes.GotoPage(&PageToGo) Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridGridSdtHistClientesPaginationBar.SelectedPage) GridGridSdtHistClientes.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event GridGridSdtHistClientesPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
GridGridSdtHistClientes.Rows = GridGridSdtHistClientesPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue GridGridSdtHistClientes.FirstPage()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoEmail'
&sdtBoleto.Clear() For &SdtHistClienteItem in &SdtHistCliente If &SdtHistClienteItem.IsSel = true &sdtBoletoItem = new() &sdtBoletoItem.CreEmpCod = &EmpCod &sdtBoletoItem.CreFilCod = &SdtHistClienteItem.FilCod &sdtBoletoItem.CreCod = &SdtHistClienteItem.CreCod &sdtBoleto.Add(&sdtBoletoItem) EndIF EndFor
if &sdtBoleto.Count > 0 &WebSession.Set('wpEnviaBoleto', &sdtBoleto.Toxml()) wpEnviaBoleto.Popup() Else msg('Nenhuma duplicata selecionada para Envio!') EndIF
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoImprimirHistorico'
&WebSession.Set('ImprimirHistorico',&SdtHistCliente.ToXml()) ListagemHistorico.Popup(&EmpCod, &CreCliCod, &DtaIni)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoCalculoJuros'
&IsSelect = False Do 'Seleciona' If &IsSelect = true WPCalculoJuros.Call(&CreCliCod) Else msg('Selecione ao menos um item para calcular os juros.') Endif
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Sub 'AttributesSecurityCode'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
If Not (&Protestos > 0) &Protestos.Visible = False Protestos_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &Protestos.Visible = True Protestos_Cell.Class = !'CellAttributeRed DscTop' EndIf If Not (&Protestos <= 0) &AuxProtestos.Visible = False AuxProtestos_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &AuxProtestos.Visible = True AuxProtestos_Cell.Class = !'DscTop' EndIf If Not (&VermelhoAtzMed > 0) &VermelhoAtzMed.Visible = False VermelhoAtzMed_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &VermelhoAtzMed.Visible = True VermelhoAtzMed_Cell.Class = !'CellAttributeRed DscTop' EndIf If Not (&AtzMed <= 0) &AtzMed.Visible = False AtzMed_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &AtzMed.Visible = True AtzMed_Cell.Class = !'DataFilterContentCell DscTop' EndIf If Not (&VermelhoTotVencido > 0) &VermelhoTotVencido.Visible = False VermelhoTotVencido_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &VermelhoTotVencido.Visible = True VermelhoTotVencido_Cell.Class = !'CellAttributeRed DscTop' EndIf If Not (&TotVencido <= 0) &TotVencido.Visible = False TotVencido_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &TotVencido.Visible = True TotVencido_Cell.Class = !'DataFilterContentCell DscTop' EndIf If &VermelhoTotVencido.Visible = False AND &TotVencido.Visible = False UnnamedTable6.Visible = False EndIf If &VermelhoAtzMed.Visible = False AND &AtzMed.Visible = False atzMed.Visible = False EndIf If &Protestos.Visible = False AND &AuxProtestos.Visible = False tbProt.Visible = False EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Event &Linhas.Click
do 'GravaPadrao'
EndEvent
Event &Linhas.IsValid
do 'GravaPadrao'
EndEvent
Event scaProgressBar1.OnComplete
tbLoad.Visible = 0 dados.Visible = 1
tbAttClICod.Visible = 1 tbtxtCliCod.Visible = 0 TableFilters.Visible = 1 For Each Order ProgressId Where ProgressId = &ProgressId
&sdtHisCliente.FromXml(ProgressLogXml) &SdtHistCliente.FromJson(&sdtHisCliente.Mensagem)
&AtzMed = &sdtHisCliente.AtrazoMedio &TotCreVlr = &sdtHisCliente.TotalDuplicataMoeda &TotDescont = &sdtHisCliente.TotalDescontoMoeda &CrePagTotItm = &sdtHisCliente.TotalPagamentoMoeda &TotAVencer = &sdtHisCliente.TotalVencerMoeda &TotVencido = &sdtHisCliente.TotalVencidoMoeda &ValorMedio = &sdtHisCliente.ValorMedioMoeda &Protestos = &sdtHisCliente.QtdPrt &DiasMedio = &sdtHisCliente.PeriodoCompra &VermelhoAtzMed = &AtzMed &VermelhoTotVencido = &TotVencido
RetornaVinculos.Call(&EmpCod,&CreCliCod,&sdtVinculos) &IsPossuiVinculo = false For &sdtVinculosItem in &sdtVinculos If &sdtVinculosItem.PesCod <> &CreCliCod &IsPossuiVinculo = true Exit EndIF EndFor
&OldDtaIni = &DtaIni &OldCreCliCod = &CreCliCod &OldOrdem = &Ordem &OldIsAbertos = &IsAbertos &OldIsVinculos = &IsVinculos
do 'GravaPadrao'
Do 'UltimoPedido' EndFor
tbtotNegoc.Visible = (&TotDescont <> 0)
apagaProgress.Submit('', &ProgressId) Do 'AttributesSecurityCode'
&CreCliCod.SetFocus()
EndEvent
Event &DtaIni.IsValid
If &OldDtaIni <> &DtaIni and (&OldCreCliCod = &CreCliCod) do 'retornaSDT' EndIF
EndEvent
Event &Ordem.Click
If &OldOrdem <> &Ordem and (&OldCreCliCod = &CreCliCod) do 'retornaSDT' EndIF
EndEvent
Event &IsAbertos.Click
If &OldIsAbertos <> &IsAbertos and (&OldCreCliCod = &CreCliCod) &OldIsAbertos = &IsAbertos do 'retornaSDT' EndIF
EndEvent
Event &IsVinculos.Click
If &OldIsVinculos <> &IsVinculos and (&OldCreCliCod = &CreCliCod) &OldIsVinculos = &IsVinculos do 'retornaSDT' EndIf
EndEvent
Sub 'GravaPadrao'
&PadObs = padL(trim(str(&CreCliCod)), 8, ' ') &PadObs += iif(&IsVinculos = true, 'S', 'N') &PadObs += iif(&IsAbertos = true, 'S', 'N') &PadObs += padL(&Ordem, 1, ' ') &PadObs += trim(str(&Hoje - &DtaIni)) &PadObs += &Linhas.ToString()
padraoUsuario.Call('G', &PgmName, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod)
IF &OldPage <> &Linhas Refresh EndiF
EndSub
Sub 'retornaSDT'
tbAttClICod.Visible = 1 tbtxtCliCod.Visible = 0
&SdtHistCliente.Clear() &sdtVinculos.Clear()
If &IsErro = false
&Random = random() * 10000000000 &ProgressId = 'Historico' + trim(str(&Random)) scaProgressBar1.ProcessId = &ProgressId scaProgressBar1.UpdateProgressURL = retornaProgresso.Link(&ProgressId)
scaProgressBar1.Start()
ConsultaHistorico.Submit('ConsultaHistorico', &ProgressId, &EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, &CreCliCod,&IsAbertos,&IsVinculos,&DtaIni,&Ordem)
tbLoad.Visible = 1 dados.Visible = 0 tbAttClICod.Visible = 0 tbtxtCliCod.Visible = 1 TableFilters.Visible = 0
Else msg('ATENÇÃO! Cliente não é do vendedor ' + TRIM(&Context.PesRaz)+'.' ) EndIf
EndSub
Sub 'ValidaClienteDoVendedor'
&IsErro = false
If &CreCliCod <> 0
For Each Order EmpCod,PesCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCod = &CreCliCod
&CreCliRaz = substr(PesRaz,1,30)
Exit When none msg('ATENÇÃO! Cliente não localizado!') EndFor
If &PesVenCod <> 0 and &AutNivTel = 0 validaVendedorCliente.Call(&EmpCod, &CreCliCod, &PesVenCod, &IsErro)
If &IsErro = true msg('ATENÇÃO! Cliente não é do vendedor ' + TRIM(&Context.PesRaz)+'.' ) EndIf EndIf EndIf
EndSub
Sub 'UltimoPedido'
&UltFilCod = 0 &UltPedCod = 0 &UltPedDtaFat.SetEmpty() &UltPedVlrLiq = 0 &UltPedFrpPgtoNom.SetEmpty() For each Order EmpCod,PedCliCod, PedSts, LctGerFin, LctAtuSal, (PedDtaFat) Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PedCliCod = &CreCliCod Where PedSts = Status_Pedido.FECHADO Where LctGerFin = Status_SimNao.Sim Where LctAtuSal = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida &UltFilCod = FilCod &UltPedCod = PedCod &UltPedDtaFat = PedDtaFat &UltPedVlrLiq = PedVlrLiq &UltPedFrpPgtoNom = PedFrpPgtoNom
&UltPedCod.Link = VerPedido.Link('', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod)
exit EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'Seleciona'
DeletaTmpJur.call(&EmpCod, &Context.PesCod, 0) For &SdtHistClienteItem in &SdtHistCliente If &SdtHistClienteItem.IsSel = true &IsSelect = true &auxCbrCod = &SdtHistClienteItem.CreCbrCod Do 'LocalCobranca' CalculaJurosLivre.Call(&EmpCod,&JurTax,&TxaMlt,&SdtHistClienteItem.CreDtaVct,&Today,&SdtHistClienteItem.CreVlrSdo,&VlrJur,&QtdDias,&VlrMlt) &VlrSdo = &SdtHistClienteItem.CreVlrSdo+&VlrJur +&VlrMlt GravaTmpJuros.Call(&EmpCod,&Context.PesCod,0,&SdtHistClienteItem.CreCliCod,&SdtHistClienteItem.CreDupNro,&SdtHistClienteItem.CreDtaVct,&Today,&QtdDias,&JurTax,&TxaMlt,&SdtHistClienteItem.CreVlrSdo,&OutVlr,&VlrJur,&VlrMlt,&VlrSdo) EndIf Endfor
EndSub
Sub 'LocalCobranca'
&IsAchou = False For each Order EmpCod,CbrCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CbrCod = &CreCbrCod &CreCbrJurCod = CbrJurCod &TxaMlt = CbrMltVlr &IsAchou = True Exit EndFor
If &IsAchou = True For each Order EmpCod,JurCod,(JurAno),(JurMes) Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where JurCod = &CreCbrJurCod Where JurAno <= year(&Today) Where JurMes <= month(&Today) &JurTax = JurTax
Exit EndFor EndIf
EndSub
//Event &CrePedCod.Click // // &Varchar = ServerTime() // // If &CrePedCod <> 0 // If &CreRecPag = ReceberPagar.Receber // &NomeArquivo = 'PedidoVenda' + trim(str(&PedCod)) // RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = RELJAS002.Link(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, &CrePedCod, &Context.PesCod, &NomeArquivo, 'S', &Varchar, true) // RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) // Else // &NomeArquivo = 'PedidoCompra' + trim(str(&PedCod)) // RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = RELJAS003.Link(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, &CrePedCod, &Context.PesCod, &NomeArquivo, 'S', &Varchar, true) // RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) // EndIf // EndIF // //EndEvent
